title: More Mob Variants Modernized
description: Port of More Mob Variants to 1.21.11!
body:
## **📖 About**
    

This mod adds new variants to the older mobs, even though they have gotten variants more mob variants adds even more to make them a little more fresh.   Variants are added through ETF and Mojang's data driven system, meaning that they will be persistent across all players. All variants and features are data-driven and ETF-Based, allowing for full customization through resourcepacks and datapacks.   For chatting, join the MoreMobVariants discord! [https://discord.gg/CeTHcXUJJv](https://discord.gg/CeTHcXUJJv)   ## 💡 Installation **This mod is available for Fabric and will be ported to NeoForge soon!** Make sure you download the correct version. **The fabric version of this mod requires Fabric API and Entity Texture Features!** Get Fabric API [here](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api "Fabric API") and Entity Texture Features [here](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures "Entity Texture Features").    This mod has to be installed server-side and client-side, although clients without the mod can still join servers with the mod.   ## 📁 Features In addition to the default texture, the mod currently features the following new variants:   **Cat:** * Gray Tabby * Doug * Handsome * Tortoiseshell * Anita Hart   **Chicken** * Amber * Bronzed * Gold Crested * Midnight * Skewbald * Stormy * Skeleton  * Duck    **Cow:** * Ashen * Cookie * Cream * Dairy * Pinto * Sunset * Umbra * Albino   **Pig :** * Mottled * Piebald * Pink-Footed * Sooty * Spotted   **Sheep _:_** * Fuzzy * Patched * Rocky * Inky * Long-nosed   **Skeletons:** * Dungeons-style * Weathered * Sandy * Mossy   **Spiders:** * Brown * Tarantula * Black Widow * Bone (rare)   **Wolf:** * All default variants from 1.20.5 * Basenji * French Bulldog * German Shepherd * Golden Retriever * Husky * Jupiter * Skeleton * White Terrier   **Zombie:** * Alex * Air * Efe * Kai * Makena * Noor * Sunny * Zuri **Credit:** [MoreMobVariants](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/more-mob-variants) **(by nyuppo)** *This is a complete rewrite of the original mod and does not use any code from it and only uses the textures and names from the original mod.*
